---
title: "Glossary"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    background-color: #508ae6; /* A light blue, for example */
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
  }
</style>
```

Stat Glossary: \

O-Swing% / Chase%: The percent of swings that a batter takes/ pitcher induces that are on pitches outside of the strike zone.


## Major League Baseball Stat Quantiles: 2025\

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse); library(here); library(kableExtra); library(knitr); source(here("R", "metrics.R")); dl_path <- "C:\\Users\\Owner\\Downloads\\R Baseball\\saberhood_webpage\\data"

quants_ps <- readRDS(here("data", "quants_ps.rds"))
quants_bbe <- readRDS(here("data", "quants_bbe.rds"))
quants_disc <- readRDS(here("data", "quants_disc.rds"))

quants_ps <- quants_ps %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 2))
quants_disc <- quants_disc %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 2))
quants_bbe <- quants_bbe %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 2))

kbl_quants_ps <- kbl(quants_ps, col.names = c("Pitch Type", "Velo", "IVB", "HB", "Spin", "VAA", "HAA"), caption = "Pitch Quantiles for Pitch Summaries") %>% 
  kable_styling(full_width = T, bootstrap_options = "striped") %>% 
  row_spec(c(0, 1:5, 11:15, 21:25, 31:35, 41:45, 51:55, 61:65), bold = T, background = "#eb8396") %>% 
  row_spec(c(6:10, 16:20, 26:30, 36:40, 46:50, 56:60), bold = T, background = "#abeb83") %>% 
  row_spec(odd_nums(1:nrow(quants_ps)), color = "#525454") %>% 
  row_spec(even_nums(1:nrow(quants_ps)), color = "#495154")
kbl_quants_bbe <- kbl(quants_bbe, col.names = c("Pitch Type", "Hard Hit %", "Barrel %", "EV", "LA"), caption = "Pitch Quantiles for Batted Ball Events") %>% 
  kable_styling(full_width = T, bootstrap_options = "striped") %>% 
  row_spec(c(0, 1:5, 11:15, 21:25, 31:35, 41:45, 51:55), bold = T, background = "#ebb083") %>% 
  row_spec(c(6:10, 16:20, 26:30, 36:40, 46:50), bold = T, background = "#83cfeb") %>% 
  row_spec(odd_nums(1:nrow(quants_bbe)), color = "#525454") %>% 
  row_spec(even_nums(1:nrow(quants_bbe)), color = "#495154")
kbl_quants_disc <- kbl(quants_disc, col.names = c("Pitch Type", "Swing %", "Whiff %", "Contact %", "Zone %", "Chase %", "Zone Swing %", "Outside Zone Contact %", "In Zone Contact %"), caption = "Pitch Quantiles for Plate Discipline") %>% 
  kable_styling(full_width = T, bootstrap_options = "striped") %>% 
  row_spec(c(0, 1:5, 11:15, 21:25, 31:35, 41:45, 51:55, 61:65), bold = T, background = "#b7c2e8") %>% 
  row_spec(c(6:10, 16:20, 26:30, 36:40, 46:50, 56:60), bold = T, background = "#ebeb83") %>% 
  row_spec(odd_nums(1:nrow(quants_disc)), color = "#525454") %>% 
  row_spec(even_nums(1:nrow(quants_disc)), color = "#495154")

#kables(list(kbl_quants_disc, kbl_quants_bbe, kbl_quants_ps))
kbl_quants_ps
  kbl_quants_bbe
kbl_quants_disc
```
